narration: Here is where stars are born. Towering pillars of gas and dust, light-years tall, glowing from within as new suns ignite inside them for the very first time. Everything you ever were came from a place like this, every atom of iron in your blood forged in a furnace among the stars. You are not visitors to the universe. You are the universe, awake, come home to watch itself begin again.

shots.prompt: Colossal pillars of glowing interstellar gas and dust light-years tall, lit from within by newborn stars, deep crimson, gold and cyan, set against a field of brilliant stars. Photoreal, epic scale, slow push in.
A newborn star igniting inside a cocoon of swirling nebula gas, a brilliant flash of white-gold light blooming outward, jets of material streaming from its poles. Spectacular, cinematic.
Drifting through luminous canyons of nebula mist, glowing tendrils of gas parting around the camera, baby stars twinkling like embers throughout. Dreamlike, immersive.
Wide majestic vista of the entire stellar nursery glowing in the dark, the ark-starship gliding into the radiant clouds, dwarfed and haloed in light. Awe-inspiring.
